title: ICU physiotherapy progress documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports cognition, vision, hearing, swallowing, movement, continence, communication, nutrition, strength, sensation, balance, mood and mental health, pain, activity, participation, environment, medicines, allergies, goals, discharge information, and documented follow-up planning.
assessment.rationale: Supports multidisciplinary assessment, goals and rehabilitation planning for ICU physiotherapy progress; no decision is generated.

source.title: Stroke rehabilitation in adults
source.setting: Hospital, community, and long-term stroke rehabilitation and review.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult stroke rehabilitation assessment and longer-term review; not an exact source for isolated TIA follow-up and not directly validated for UAE services.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.14 — stroke assessment and rehabilitation plan

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports cognition, vision, hearing, swallowing, movement, continence, communication, nutrition, strength, sensation, balance, mood and mental health, pain, activity, participation, environment, medicines, allergies, goals, discharge information, and documented follow-up planning.

assessment.text: Supports post-transfer follow-up, information needs, daily activities, participation goals, work, driving and transport discussion, and review of health and social care needs at 6 months and annually.
assessment.rationale: Supports transfer and follow-up review for ICU physiotherapy progress; no decision is generated.
